summary: Website for Mahaveer Plywood & Interiors featuring a white/gold luxury theme, 27+ years experience, WhatsApp integration, product catalog with enquiry basket, quote builder, and admin panel.
architectural_notes: White theme with gold accents, premium/luxury aesthetic, mobile-responsive
Quote range: ₹1,00,000 - ₹2,00,000+; entire home furniture below ₹8,00,000 shown as Not Applicable
Services: Plywood, Hardware, Laminates, Electrical, Paints, Interiors
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Luxury interior showroom with warm lighting, wooden panels and premium furniture for hero background (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Plywood stacks and timber sheets in a hardware store setting (service-plywood.dim_600x400.png)
- Metal hardware components including hinges, handles and screws on a white background (service-hardware.dim_600x400.png)
- Colorful laminate sheets fanned out showing various wood grain and solid color finishes (service-laminates.dim_600x400.png)
- Modern electrical fittings and wiring accessories arranged neatly (service-electrical.dim_600x400.png)
- Paint cans and color swatches in warm tones on a clean surface (service-paints.dim_600x400.png)
- Finished luxury interior living room with modular furniture and elegant decor (service-interiors.dim_600x400.png)
- Modern luxury kitchen with wooden cabinets and marble countertop (gallery-kitchen.dim_800x600.png)
- Elegant wardrobe with sliding doors and interior shelving (gallery-wardrobe.dim_800x600.png)
- Sophisticated living room interior with custom furniture and lighting (gallery-living.dim_800x600.png)
- Premium bedroom interior with built-in storage and ambient lighting (gallery-bedroom.dim_800x600.png)
- Modern office interior with wooden paneling and clean lines (gallery-office.dim_800x600.png)
- Luxury bathroom with wooden vanity and premium fixtures (gallery-bathroom.dim_800x600.png)
- Gold and white abstract logo mark for Mahaveer Plywood company (logo-icon.dim_200x200.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a white/gold luxury theme across the entire frontend with clean, premium aesthetics, gold accents, and mobile-responsive design consistent with the existing CSS token setup.

Build the Hero section with a full-screen background image, company headline, subheadline, CTA buttons linking to the quote and gallery sections, and four trust-indicator cards showing 27+ years experience, 5000+ projects, satisfaction rating, and category count.

Build the Services section showcasing six services: Plywood, Hardware, Laminates, Electrical, Paints, and Interiors — each with a service card containing image, title, description, feature list, and a 'Get Free Quote' button that scrolls to the quote section.

Build the Product Catalog section with category filter tabs, a search input, and a grid of product cards. Each product card shows image, category badge, description, and action buttons to inquire via WhatsApp or add to the enquiry basket. Display an InquiryBasket panel when items are selected.

Build the Premium Quote Builder section where users select rooms and a quality tier (Essential / Premium / Luxury) to receive an estimated interior project cost range, then send the quote details via WhatsApp. Show 'Not Applicable' for entire home furniture packages below ₹8,00,000.

Build the Pricing section with three tiers — Essential, Premium, and Luxury — each rendered as a pricing card with features list, price range, and a CTA button. The most popular tier should be visually highlighted.

Build the Gallery section with a 3-column image grid where clicking an image opens a full-screen lightbox with previous/next navigation, keyboard support (arrow keys and Escape), and an image caption.

Build the Contractor Zone section targeting contractors, displaying four partnership benefits (bulk pricing, fast delivery, quality, support) alongside a contractor inquiry form that collects name, phone, company, project type, and message, then opens a WhatsApp chat with the formatted details.

Build the Contact section displaying business info cards (phone, email, address, hours) alongside a Site Visit Booking Form (name, phone, address, preferred date/time, notes) and a Quick Estimate Form (name, phone, project type, budget, area). Both forms send details via WhatsApp. Block Quick Estimate submissions for full-home projects below the minimum budget.
Add a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner with an animated ping indicator that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat to number 919588046569.
Build the fixed top Navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to all page sections, company name and phone number CTA pulled from business settings, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
Build the site Footer displaying the company logo, quick navigation links, and contact details (phone, email, address) with a copyright bar at the bottom.

Build the PIN-protected Admin Panel (PIN: 2580) with tabs for managing products (add/edit/delete), business settings (company name, phone, email, address, hours), and WhatsApp message templates with a live preview editor.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement the backend Motoko actor with data models and endpoints for: product catalog (CRUD), business settings (contact info, WhatsApp templates), and role-based access control for admin operations.
